text:
effective 10/01/2017
695 P0200A_BED_ALARM_IND P0200A_BED_ALARM_IND P0200A Bed Alarm CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often a bed alarm was used to monitor resident movement and alert staff. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not used
1=Used less than daily
2=Used Daily effective 10/01/2017
696 P0200B_CHR_ALARM_IND P0200B_CHR_ALARM_IND P0200B Chair Alarm CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often a chair alarm was used to monitor resident movement and alert staff. -=Not
